manifestation_levels.U1-A: frozen — body tense, breath held, minimal movement
manifestation_levels.U1-B: first thaw — blushing, hesitant movement, softening
manifestation_levels.U2-A: warming — body relaxes, first smiles, eye contact
manifestation_levels.U2-B: curiosity — leaning in, first questions, touch of hair
manifestation_levels.U3-A: opening — laughter, shared gaze, physical proximity
manifestation_levels.U3-B: trust — first touch, leaning on shoulder, whispering
manifestation_levels.U4-A: surrender — closed eyes, passive acceptance, trembling
manifestation_levels.U5-A: blooming — expressing desires, initiating, surprising herself
manifestation_levels.U5-B: natural — effortless sensuality, no performance, pure being
manifestation_levels.U6-A: playful — experimenting, laughing during intimacy, joy
manifestation_levels.U6-B: confident — directing, asking for what she wants, power
manifestation_levels.U7-A: fear_of_loss — 'will he still want me if I'm not shy?'
manifestation_levels.U7-B: integrated — 'I am both shy and bold, and that is my strength'

subjective_desire.description: safety_first — subjective desire requires extended emotional safety
